packet_types.label: DB schema change
migration_order: Validate the runtime dependency and env contract first.
Cut configured runtimes over from memory fallback to durable persistence.
Run restart-safe recovery proof before clearing the launch blocker.
exact_steps: Create checkpoint tables or mirrored bootstrap/run tables in implementation authority SQL first.
Review dependency and env changes before runtime mutation.
Apply schema change during an intentional maintenance window only.
Run restart-safe recovery proof before clearing the durable-persistence blocker.
rollback_steps: Restore pre-migration schema snapshot or backup.
Return runtime to the previous persistence posture.

packet_types.label: VAULT provider auth repair
packet_types.boundary: LiteLLM runtime mutation on VAULT remains ask-first
exact_steps: Back up the current litellm container definition before edit.
Repair missing or invalid provider env delivery through the approved host-local secret surface.
Re-run provider-specific probes and the env audit.
rollback_steps: Restore the saved container definition or secret surface.
Restart the litellm container with the prior env contract.
Re-run the same probes to confirm rollback.

packet_types.label: Systemd runtime change
exact_steps: Capture the current unit file and active environment contract.
Apply the change during an intentional maintenance window.
Reload systemd and restart only the affected unit.
Run health and operator smoke checks immediately.
rollback_steps: Reload systemd and restart the affected unit.

packet_types.label: Destructive branch cleanup
packet_types.boundary: destructive git cleanup outside the prune policy remains ask-first
exact_steps: Inventory the branches and worktrees targeted for removal.
Delete only the approved branches or worktrees.
rollback_steps: Restore the archived refs or worktrees.
Repoint the operator workflow to the restored state.

packet_types.label: Runtime host reconfiguration
exact_steps: Document the targeted host surfaces and expected impact.
Run topology-owned health and smoke checks.
rollback_steps: Re-run the same health and smoke checks.
